title: The Book-Worms.
content:
Through and through the inspir'd leaves,
            Ye maggots, make your windings;
        But oh! respect his lordship's taste,
            And spare his golden bindings.
meaning:
Robert Burns's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Book-Worms."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
